generated_exposure.exposure_text: 🚨 Did you know? While our leaders debate defense budgets, local communities are left unprepared. My town's emergency response team was cut by 30% last year - no national alerts, just silent cuts. We need balanced security that protects *all* of us, not just big-ticket weapons. #CommunityFirst #SmartSecurity
